title: Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza Menu with Prices 2026
description: The definitive guide to Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza. Explore 2026 USA price list for Small to XL sizes, Epic Stuffed Crust upgrades, and full nutrition facts.
fullContent:
The Papa John's Pepperoni Pizza is more than just a menu item; it is a global phenomenon and the undisputed king of pizza delivery across the United States. In 2026, it continues to lead the charts as the most ordered classic pizza, loved for its perfect ratio of savory, spicy pepperoni to melted 100% real mozzarella cheese. If you are looking to save on your next order, be sure to check our latest Papa John's Coupons for exclusive deals.

What sets our Pepperoni Pizza apart from the competition starts with the foundation: our original hand-tossed dough. Made with just six simple ingredients, our dough is never frozen and arrives fresh at every Papa John's location across the USA. This ensures a chewy, golden-brown crust that serves as the perfect canvas for our world-famous signature pizza sauce. Made from vine-ripened tomatoes grown in the sun-drenched valleys of California, our sauce is packed and canned within hours of harvest to lock in that natural sweetness.

As we move to the toppings, we layer a generous amount of premium, high-quality pepperoni slices. These aren't your average pizza toppings; they are specially seasoned to reach a perfect crispiness in our high-heat ovens, releasing just the right amount of spicy oil to meld with the cheese. For those watching their intake, you can review the official Papa John's Nutrition Guide which states that a single slice of our standard 14-inch Large original crust pepperoni pizza contains approximately 230-320 calories.

Whether you're ordering a 'Small' for a quick lunch in downtown Manhattan or an 'Extra Large' for a late-night party in Los Angeles, Papa John's ensures regional price consistency with high value. Our 2026 price guide reflects the best value for money in the fast-food industry, especially when you join Papa Rewards® to earn points on every dollar spent. Experience the recipe that defined an era of better ingredients and better pizza.

allergens.name: Soy
allergens.note: Soybean oil used in dough and seasonings.

allergens.name: Eggs
allergens.note: The original dough and pepperoni do not contain egg.

allergens.name: Nuts
allergens.note: Produced in a facility that may handle nut-based toppings.

faqs.question: What is the 2026 price for a Large Pepperoni Pizza?
faqs.answer: In 2026, the standard price for a Large 14" Pepperoni Original Crust pizza is **$17.99**. For those craving extra cheese in the crust, the Epic Stuffed Crust version is available for **$20.99**.

faqs.question: How many calories are in one slice of Pepperoni pizza?
faqs.answer: A single slice of a Large hand-tossed original crust Pepperoni pizza contains approximately **230 to 320 calories**. Opting for the Thin Crust can reduce this to about **210 calories** per slice.

faqs.question: Can I customize the crust type for Pepperoni Pizza?
faqs.answer: Yes! Papa John's offers **Original Hand-Tossed, Crispy Thin, Epic Stuffed Crust, and Gluten-Free** options. Note that the Gluten-Free crust is currently only available for Small 10-inch pizzas.

faqs.question: Does Papa John's use real mozzarella?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use **100% real mozzarella cheese** made from high-quality milk. We never use starch-based fillers or analog cheeses found in lower-tier pizza chains.

faqs.question: What dipping sauce comes with the Pepperoni Pizza?
faqs.answer: Every standard pizza order includes one cup of our legendary **Special Garlic Dipping Sauce** and one signature Peperoncini pepper in the box.

faqs.question: How many slices are in each size?
faqs.answer: Small (6 slices), Medium (8 slices), Large (8 slices), and Extra Large (10 slices). We also offer **Square Cut** for larger parties.

faqs.question: Is the pepperoni halal or pork-based?
faqs.answer: In the United States, Papa John's pepperoni is made from a blend of **pork and beef**. It is not considered Halal. For Halal options, please check specific international locations.

faqs.question: Are there any current Pepperoni Pizza deals?
faqs.answer: Yes, we often have 'Any Large Specialty' deals. Visit our Coupons Page for the best updated 2026 discounts.

title: Papa John's The Works™ Pizza Menu with Prices 2026
description: Complete guide to The Works™ pizza. Prices for 2026, ingredient breakdown, and detailed comparison with 'The Meats'.
fullContent:
When you want everything on your pizza, **The Works™ from Papa John's** is the ultimate choice. As one of the most loaded specialty pizzas in the industry, it combines premium meats and fresh-cut vegetables to create a symphony of flavors that has defined 'Better Ingredients' for decades. In 2026, it remains a top-tier choice for families looking for maximum value. Be sure to check our Active Coupons to get The Works at a discount today.

The magic of The Works™ lies in its diversity. We start with our original, never-frozen dough and apply a generous layer of our vine-ripened tomato sauce. Then comes the massive topping load: spicy Italian sausage, premium pepperoni, julienne-cut Canadian bacon, fresh-cut onions, crisp green peppers, mushrooms, and ripe black olives. All of this is smothered in 100% real mozzarella cheese. This pizza is so heavy that we recommend ordering it on our Original Crust to handle the weight.

From a nutritional standpoint, a single slice of a Large The Works™ pizza contains approximately 290-360 calories. For a full breakdown, the Official Papa John's Nutrition Guide provides detailed insights for health-conscious diners. Whether you are ordering a late-night feast in Chicago or a weekend treat in Houston, you can find the nearest branch using our Store Locator. Join Papa Rewards® to earn points on every 'Works' pizza you order in 2026.

allergens.name: Milk
allergens.note: Contains cheese and dairy in toppings.

allergens.name: Wheat
allergens.note: Dough contains gluten and wheat flour.

allergens.name: Soy
allergens.note: Soy used in sauce and pepperoni seasonings.

allergens.name: Pork
allergens.note: Contains Italian sausage, pepperoni, and Canadian bacon.

sizes.size: Large Epic Stuffed Crust The Works™

faqs.question: What 8 toppings are on The Works™?
faqs.answer: The Works™ is packed with **Pepperoni, Spicy Italian Sausage, Canadian Bacon, Onions, Green Peppers, Mushrooms, and Black Olives**, plus 100% real mozzarella cheese.

faqs.question: The Works vs The Meats: Which is better?
faqs.answer: If you love a 'Supreme' style pizza with a balance of veggies and meats, **The Works™** is better. If you want only beef, sausage, bacon, and pepperoni without any veggies, choose **The Meats™**.

faqs.question: How many calories in a slice of Large The Works™?
faqs.answer: One slice of a Large hand-tossed The Works™ pizza contains approximately **330 calories**. The Thin Crust version reduces this to about **280 calories**.

faqs.question: Does The Works™ have pork?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Italian sausage, pepperoni, and Canadian bacon are **pork-based products**. For meat-free loaded options, we recommend the 'Garden Fresh' specialty pizza.

faqs.question: What is the best sauce for The Works™?
faqs.answer: While it comes with Special Garlic Sauce, many fans prefer the **Pizza Sauce (Tomato)** or **BBQ Sauce** for dipping the crust of this loaded pie.

faqs.question: Is The Works™ suitable for a Gluten-Free diet?
faqs.answer: While the toppings themselves may not contain gluten, our specialized **Gluten-Free crust** is currenty only offered on Small size pizzas, and cross-contamination can occur in kitchens.

faqs.question: How much is the Epic Stuffed Crust version of The Works™?
faqs.answer: In 2026, upgrading The Works™ to an Epic Stuffed Crust will bring the total to approximately **$23.99** at most North American locations.

faqs.question: How do I order The Works™ near me?
faqs.answer: Use our Store Locator to find your local Papa John's and check for regional price variations before ordering online.

title: Papa John's Philly Cheesesteak Papadia Price & Review 2026
description: Comprehensive guide to the Philly Cheesesteak Papadia. 2026 prices, calories, sauce pairings, and why it is better than a calzone.
fullContent:
The **Philly Cheesesteak Papadia** is a culinary masterpiece inspired by the classic flavors of Philadelphia, reimagined into a portable flatbread sandwich. Since its launch, it has become a staple for lunch-goers and solo diners across the United States. In 2026, it remains one of the highest-value items on the Papa John's Menu. To save even more on your lunch break, view our Daily Deals.

What makes the Philly Papadia stand out is the quality of the fillings. We use tender, sliced steak strips combined with fresh-cut onions and green peppers. Instead of standard pizza sauce, this sandwich features a rich, creamy garlic sauce base and melted mozzarella cheese. It is all folded into a toasted flatbread made from our original signature dough. It is a handheld version of a 'Super Loaded' experience, making it perfect for on-the-go meals in busy cities like New York or Seattle.

According to Cheesesteak history, the combination of steak and onions is a timeless American tradition, and Papa John's honors this with every Papadia made. One Philly Cheesesteak Papadia contains roughly 810 calories and is served with our iconic Special Garlic dipping sauce. Ensure you are getting the best price in 2026 by using the Store Locator to find regional pricing at your nearest Papa John's.

allergens.name: Milk
allergens.note: Contains cheese and garlic sauce dairy.

allergens.name: Soy
allergens.note: Soybean oil found in liquid garlic sauce.

faqs.question: What sauce is in the Philly Cheesesteak Papadia?
faqs.answer: Unlike regular pizzas, this uses a **Creamy Garlic Sauce** base instead of tomato sauce, which complements the steak and onions perfectly.

faqs.question: Is a Papadia just a Calzone?
faqs.answer: No. While similar, a **Papadia** is a folded flatbread made from our original dough, whereas a Calzone is typically stuffed and crimped around the edges. Papadias are lighter and easier to eat with one hand.

faqs.question: How much protein is in a Philly Papadia?
faqs.answer: A Philly Cheesesteak Papadia is high in protein, providing approximately **35 to 40 grams of protein** per sandwich depending on the steak density.

faqs.question: Is the Philly Papadia worth it for lunch?
faqs.answer: At **$7.99**, it is considered one of the best lunch deals in the USA fast-food market for 2026, offering more satiety than a standard sandwich.

faqs.question: How many calories are in the Philly Papadia?
faqs.answer: One Philly Cheesesteak Papadia contains approximately **810 calories**. If you add the dipping sauce, the total is around **960 calories**.

faqs.question: Is the steak in the Papadia real beef?
faqs.answer: Yes, Papa John's uses **premium sliced steak strips**—no fillers—marinated and seasoned in traditional Philly style.

faqs.question: Can I get a Papadia with Thin Crust?
faqs.answer: No, Papadias are exclusively made with our **original hand-tossed dough** flattened into a signature shell to maintain the authentic 'part-pizza, part-sandwich' texture.

faqs.question: What is the 'Parmesan Crusted' version?
faqs.answer: For an additional **$1.00**, we bake a layer of parmesan and herb seasoning into the outer shell for extra crunch and savory flavor.
